title: Combination of property path, union, and optional seems problematic
key_bug_features: Combination of property path, union, and optional
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), description TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, description) VALUES (1, 'Alkaloids', NULL);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, description) VALUES (2, 'Glycosides', 'A type of compound.');
SELECT DISTINCT name, (SELECT MIN(description) FROM test_table WHERE description IS NOT NULL) AS min_desc FROM test_table WHERE name IS NOT NULL;
SELECT name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM test_table GROUP BY name HAVING count > 1;
